raw_payload.roomDescription: This 484-square-foot non-smoking room offers city views and features one king bed, a separate sitting area, and a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, a free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping.  A doorbell and phone notification are provided. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.

Amenities include premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. raw_payload.roomDescription: This elegant, air-conditioned suite boasts Business Bay views and features a living area with a flat-screen TV, minibar, and tea/coffee facilities.  The en-suite marble bathroom includes two sinks, a bath, a hairdryer, and Molton Brown toiletries.  Access is also provided to the Executive Lounge, cocktails, butler service, steam room, hot tub, and a meeting room.  Interconnecting access to a Luxury Room City View with its own main entrance is available.

raw_payload.roomDescription: This 882-square-foot Executive Level room offers a king bed, city views, and access to the Executive Lounge (including buffet breakfast, light refreshments, internet access, and 2 hours of meeting room use, subject to availability).  The room features a bedroom, living room, and dining area. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower, a safe, a free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping.  A rollaway/extra bed and crib/infant bed are available upon request.  Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.  The room is non-smoking.  Doorbell and phone notification are available for accessibility.

BURJ, LUXURY, TWIN BEDS
raw_payload.roomDescription: This 484 sq ft non-smoking room features two twin beds, a separate sitting area, and a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, a free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping.  A doorbell and phone notification are provided. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.

raw_payload.name: BURJ, LUXURY, KING BED
raw_payload.roomDescription: This 484 sq ft non-smoking room features one king bed, a separate sitting area, and a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, a free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping.  A doorbell and phone notification are provided. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.

raw_payload.name: LUXURY, SUITE, KING BED
raw_payload.roomDescription: This 1238 sq ft executive-level suite features a bedroom, living room, and dining area.  Amenities include a king bed, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, and blackout drapes.  Two bathrooms offer a deep soaking bathtub and a separate shower.  A kitchenette is equipped with a refrigerator, microwave, cookware/dishware, and coffee/tea maker.  Enjoy an LED television with cable channels, free WiFi, and daily housekeeping.  Executive Lounge access provides buffet breakfast, light refreshments, internet access, and 2 hours of meeting room use (subject to availability).  A safe, iron/ironing board, and free newspaper are also provided.  Rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request.  Air conditioning, doorbell/phone notification, and turndown service are included.  The suite is non-smoking, and connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.
